name: Confirm Transaction
desc: Server confirms or rejects an inventory transaction from C0EPacketClickWindow. accepted=false causes client to revert inventory.

fields.name: actionNumber
fields.desc: Transaction action number from the click packet

fields.name: accepted
fields.desc: Whether the server accepted the click

notes: If accepted=false, the client empties and refills its inventory by re-reading all slots from the server (C30PacketWindowItems is re-sent). This is how the server corrects desynced client inventory.

modules.name: Disabler
modules.purpose: Cancel or delay transaction confirmations. Disabler buffers S32. Backtrack delays S32 for reach extension.

modules.name: InvManager
modules.purpose: Cancel or delay transaction confirmations. Disabler buffers S32. Backtrack delays S32 for reach extension.

modules.name: Backtrack
modules.purpose: Cancel or delay transaction confirmations. Disabler buffers S32. Backtrack delays S32 for reach extension.
